rulings.Case Title: AMERICAN RECOVERY SERVICE INCORPORATED,A CORPORATI VS. THEODORE J MARR et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 31, 2008, line 1, CROSS-DEFENDANT CELESTIAL ASIA SECURITIES HOLDINGS LIMITED MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT SHIFTED THE BURDEN OF PRODUCING EVIDENCE BY RELIANCE ON THE REQUESTS FOR ADMISSIONS THAT ESTABLISH THAT CASH DID NOT RECEIVE ANY TRANSFER OF ASSETS, AN ESSENTIAL ELEMENT OF EACH OF THE CAUSES OF ACTION. CROSS-COMPLAINANT FAILS TO RAISE A TRIABLE ISSUE OF FACT FOR THE OPPOSITION IS BASED ON THE CONTENTION THAT THE DISCOVERY ORDER WOULD BE VACATED. THE OPPOSITION WAS FILED LATE AND THE EXPLANATION FOR THE DELAY IN FILING IS PROBLEMATIC. =(302/PJM/JW)

rulings.Case Title: OLEG TACHKOV VS. ELINA TACHKOVA-DAVENPORT et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Approving Receiver'S Final Account And Report, Discharge Of Receiver, Exoneration Of Receiver'S Bond And Approval Of Compensation And Expenses Of Receiver; Receiver'S Final Report And Account And Exonaration Of Receiver'S Bond And Declaratin Of Susan L. Uecker.
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 31, 2008, line 2, RECEIVER SUSAN UECKER'S Motion For Order Approving Receiver's Final Account And Report, Discharge Of Receiver, Exoneration Of Receiver's Bond And Approval Of Compensation And Expenses Of Receiver; Receiver's Final Report And Account And Exoneration Of Receiver's Bond. THE MOTION IS GRANTED. ELINA TACHKOVA-DAVENPORT HAS FAILED TO PRESENT ANY ADMISSIBLE EVIDENCE CHALLENGING THE RECEIVER'S REPORT. -THE $33,000 DRAW IS A 2005 TRANSACTION. -THE REQUEST FOR A $45,000 CREDIT IS DENIED BECAUSE THERE IS NO EVIDENCE AS TO WHAT THE PAYMENTS WERE FOR. -THE REQUEST RELATED TO 4 CHECKS IN EX. C. IS DENIED. THERE IS NO EVIDENCE AS TO WHAT THE CHECKS WERE FOR AND THE CHECKS HAVE NOT BEEN AUTHENTICATED. -TACHKOVA-DAVENPORT FAILS TO ESTABLISH THAT SHE IS ENTITLED TO A CREDIT OF $1,468.77 OR $37.19 FOR A MONEY ORDER OR THAT THE RECEIVER FAILED TO REFERENCE ALL PURCHASES AND SALES. -THE PARTIES ARE TO SPLIT THE COST OF 2008 TAX RETURNS AND MS. TACHKOVA-DAVENPORT IS TO PAY $975.24 FOR THE COSTS INCURRED BASED ON HER UNSUBSTANTIATED REQUESTS. =(302/PJM/PB)

rulings.Case Title: SIU L. MA VS. RICK D. MILLER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrer Of Ishmael Ikharo To Pltf'S First Amended Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 31, 2008, line 3, DEFENDANT ISHMAEL IKHARO'S Demurrer To Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint. THE DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION, NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE DEMURRER IS OVERRULED AS TO THE OTHER CAUSES OF ACTION, 10 DAYS TO ANSWER. THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION SEEKS RESTITUTION PURSUANT TO BUSINESS & PROFFESSIONS CODE SECTION 7157. FRAUD IS PROPERLY PLEAD AS AN ALTERNATIVE THEORY. INTERFERENCE WITH CONTRACT IS PROPERLY ALLEGED. =(302/PJM/VC)
